overview: Qwen3-Omni is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-Omni line. Released 2025-09-22. Natively end-to-end omni-modal models that take text, image, audio and video in and stream text plus natural speech out in real time.
What's notable in this version: Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B (30B total / 3B active MoE) with Instruct, Thinking and Captioner variants; open-source SOTA on most of 36 audio/AV benchmarks; Apache 2.0.
